generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to maintain our nation's strategic autonomy. Recent events show that relying too much on foreign allies for our defense needs puts us at risk. We've seen how quickly alliances can shift when interests change. It's time to invest in our own capabilities, not just for security but to ensure we're never caught off guard again. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
